// ── PRICE_DATA_START (auto-updated by update_accuracy.py — do not edit manually) ── const PRICE_DATA = {}; const PRICE_DATA_UPDATED = "never"; // ── PRICE_DATA_END ── // ── PERFORMANCE_DATA_START (auto-updated by update_performance.py — do not edit manually) ── const PERFORMANCE_DATA = {"updated": "never", "stats_1yr": null, "stats_3yr": null}; // ── PERFORMANCE_DATA_END ── function accuracyFor(r, sig) { if (sig.alwaysAccurate) { var lbl = sig.accLabel ? ' ' + sig.accLabel + '' : ''; return { html: 'OK' + lbl, hit: true, isLev: false }; } if (!sig.underlying) return { html: '-', hit: null, isLev: false }; var map = (typeof PRICE_DATA !== "undefined") ? PRICE_DATA[sig.underlying] : null; if (!map) return { html: 'no data', hit: null, isLev: true }; var dates = Object.keys(map).sort(); var next = null; for (var i = 0; i < dates.length; i++) { if (dates[i] > r[0]) { next = dates[i]; break; } } if (!next) return { html: 'pending', hit: null, isLev: true }; var info = map[next]; var expectedDir = sig.type === "bullish" ? "up" : sig.type === "bearish" ? "down" : null; if (!expectedDir) return { html: '-', hit: null, isLev: false }; var hit = (info.change === expectedDir); return { html: '' + (hit ? 'OK' : 'X') + '' + ' ' + sig.underlying + '' + '' + info.close + '', hit: hit, isLev: true }; } function spikeFor(r, sig, accuracy) { var pct = function(s) { return s === "-" ? 0 : parseFloat(s); }; var maxLev = Math.max(pct(r[1]), pct(r[5]), pct(r[4]), pct(r[8]), pct(r[9])); if (maxLev <= 50) return { html: '-', hit: null }; if (accuracy.hit === null) return { html: '-', hit: null }; return { html: '' + (accuracy.hit ? 'OK' : 'X') + '', hit: accuracy.hit }; } function computeAccuracyStats() { if (typeof ALLOC_DATA === "undefined") return; var today = new Date(); var oneYearAgo = new Date(today); oneYearAgo.setFullYear(today.getFullYear() - 1); var a1H=0, a1T=0, a3H=0, a3T=0; var s1H=0, s1T=0, s3H=0, s3T=0; ALLOC_DATA.forEach(function(r) { var sig = classify(r); var acc = accuracyFor(r, sig); var rd = new Date(r[0] + "T00:00:00"); var in1y = rd >= oneYearAgo; if (sig.alwaysAccurate) { a3T++; a3H++; if (in1y) { a1T++; a1H++; } } else if (acc.hit !== null) { a3T++; if (acc.hit) a3H++; if (in1y) { a1T++; if (acc.hit) a1H++; } } var spk = spikeFor(r, sig, acc); if (spk.hit !== null) { s3T++; if (spk.hit) s3H++; if (in1y) { s1T++; if (spk.hit) s1H++; } } }); function fmt(h,t) { return t === 0 ? "-" : (h/t*100).toFixed(1) + "%"; } function det(h,t) { return t === 0 ? "-" : h + " of " + t; } function setT(id, txt) { var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.textContent = txt; } setT("accuracy-rate-1yr", fmt(a1H,a1T)); setT("accuracy-detail-1yr", det(a1H,a1T) + " trading days"); setT("accuracy-rate-3yr", fmt(a3H,a3T)); setT("accuracy-detail-3yr", det(a3H,a3T) + " trading days"); setT("accuracy-rate", fmt(a3H,a3T)); setT("accuracy-detail", (typeof PRICE_DATA_UPDATED !== "undefined" && PRICE_DATA_UPDATED !== "never") ? "Updated " + PRICE_DATA_UPDATED : "Run update_accuracy.py"); setT("spike-rate-1yr", fmt(s1H,s1T)); setT("spike-detail-1yr", det(s1H,s1T) + " spike days"); setT("spike-rate-3yr", fmt(s3H,s3T)); setT("spike-detail-3yr", det(s3H,s3T) + " spike days"); } function computeStats() { if (typeof ALLOC_DATA === "undefined") return; var bearish=0, bullish=0; ALLOC_DATA.forEach(function(r) { var sig = classify(r); if (sig.type === "bearish") bearish++; if (sig.type === "bullish") bullish++; }); var bc = document.getElementById("bearish-count"); var blc = document.getElementById("bullish-count"); if (bc) bc.textContent = bearish; if (blc) blc.textContent = bullish; } computeStats(); computeAccuracyStats();
